query.rawQueryText: SELECT name FROM categories WHERE NOT is_income ORDER BY name

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(-SUM(amount_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS value FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-${window_days} days') AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring}))

panels.title: vs prior period
panels.description: Comparison to the equally-sized window immediately before. Positive = spending more lately.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH cur AS (SELECT COALESCE(-SUM(amount_cents), 0) AS v FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-${window_days} days') AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring}))), prev AS (SELECT COALESCE(-SUM(amount_cents), 0) AS v FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-' || (2 * ${window_days}) || ' days') AND date < date('now', '-${window_days} days') AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring}))) SELECT CASE WHEN prev.v = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(100.0 * (cur.v - prev.v) / prev.v, 1) END AS value FROM cur, prev

panels.title: vs budget (in-scope categories)
panels.description: Total spend in the selected window vs sum of monthly budgets × (window_days / 30) for the same category subset. <100% = under budget.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH spent AS (SELECT COALESCE(-SUM(amount_cents), 0) AS v FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-${window_days} days') AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring})) AND category_name IN (SELECT category_name FROM budgets)), budget AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthly_cents), 0) * ${window_days} / 30.0 AS v FROM budgets WHERE ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring}))) SELECT CASE WHEN budget.v = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(100.0 * spent.v / budget.v, 1) END AS value FROM spent, budget

panels.title: Spend by category — top 20 in window

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(category_name, '(uncategorized)') AS Category, -SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0 AS "Spend (EUR)" FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-${window_days} days') AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring})) GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY "Spend (EUR)" DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: All categories — total, average, vs budget, vs prior

targets.rawQueryText: WITH cur AS (SELECT COALESCE(category_group_name, '(none)') AS grp, COALESCE(category_name, '(uncategorized)') AS cat, -SUM(amount_cents) AS v, COUNT(*) AS n FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-${window_days} days') AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring})) GROUP BY category_name, category_group_name), prev AS (SELECT COALESCE(category_name, '(uncategorized)') AS cat, -SUM(amount_cents) AS v FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-' || (2 * ${window_days}) || ' days') AND date < date('now', '-${window_days} days') GROUP BY category_name) SELECT cur.grp AS "Group", cur.cat AS Category, cur.n AS Txns, ROUND(cur.v / 100.0, 2) AS "Total (EUR)", ROUND(cur.v * 30.0 / ${window_days} / 100.0, 2) AS "Avg/month (EUR)", b.monthly_cents / 100.0 AS "Budget (EUR/mo)", CASE WHEN b.monthly_cents IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(100.0 * cur.v / (b.monthly_cents * ${window_days} / 30.0), 0) END AS "% of budget", CASE WHEN COALESCE(prev.v, 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(100.0 * (cur.v - prev.v) / prev.v, 0) END AS "vs prior %" FROM cur LEFT JOIN budgets b ON b.category_name = cur.cat LEFT JOIN prev ON prev.cat = cur.cat ORDER BY cur.v DESC

SELECT COALESCE(payee_name, '(none)') AS Payee, COUNT(*) AS Txns, ROUND(-SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS "Total (EUR)", ROUND(-AVG(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS "Avg per txn", ROUND(-MIN(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS "Largest single" FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-${window_days} days') AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring})) GROUP BY payee_name ORDER BY -SUM(amount_cents) DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT date AS Date, COALESCE(payee_name, '?') AS Payee, COALESCE(category_name, '(uncategorized)') AS Category, -amount_cents / 100.0 AS "Amount (EUR)", account_name AS Account, COALESCE(notes, '') AS Notes FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-${window_days} days') AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring})) ORDER BY amount_cents ASC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Top 8 categories in window — monthly spend over time

targets.rawQueryText: WITH top_cats AS (SELECT category_name FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-${window_days} days') AND category_name IS NOT NULL AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring})) GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY -SUM(amount_cents) DESC LIMIT 8) SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', month || '-01') AS INTEGER) AS time, category_name AS metric, -SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0 AS value FROM spending WHERE category_name IN (SELECT category_name FROM top_cats) AND date >= date('now', '-${window_days} days') GROUP BY month, category_name ORDER BY month

panels.title: Day-of-month spending pattern (last 12 months)
panels.description: X = day of month (1-31). Y = month. Color intensity = total spend that day. Spot rent on the 1st, payday clusters, end-of-month wind-downs.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', date) AS INTEGER) AS time, ROUND(-SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS value FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-365 days') AND ('${category:csv}' = '' OR category_name IN (${category:sqlstring})) GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
